title: Prodigy and Mediocrity
overview: Yu Ayase transfers to a school for prodigies—but despite his gifted mother, he's perfectly mediocre.

title: Her Secret
overview: Tasked with looking out for the sisters, Yu tries to win them over—through their stomachs.

title: I Want Us to Be a Family
overview: Yu begins to get to know the three sisters, and they start to see him as more than just an unwelcome guest.

title: A Memory the Sisters Can Share
overview: Yu carries out his plan to have the sisters enjoy the Cherry Blossom Night Festival together.

title: A Father's Teachings
overview: The three sisters grow closer after the festival... and then their father comes home.

title: This Is a Date
overview: As Kazuki prepares for her most challenging role yet, she asks Yu on a date to get in the mindset.

title: You Will Win No Matter What
overview: Yu throws himself into intense training with Niko's help, preparing for his one-on-one showdown with Hayato.

title: I'll Make You Swoon
overview: Niko wins the battle against Hayato, so she says to Yu “I’ll grant you any wish” for doing his best for her.

title: The Shadow of a Genius
overview: Yu delivers Miwa's forgotten lunch during her shogi game. Touched, she asks him to have lunch with her.

title: I Already Knew It
overview: Kazuki and Niko try to console Miwa, but she gets angry and runs out of the house. Yu goes to look for her.

title: For Someone Else
overview: Miwa faces off against Sakura now imbued with focus and determination.
